category_sources: Official Montage README describes it as an astronomical image mosaics toolkit for FITS images.
source_facts.description says Montage assembles FITS images into custom mosaics.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is montage; official Caltech-IPAC repository and homepage use Montage.
docs_sources: Official IPAC Montage documentation includes user documentation, build instructions, and toolkit component documentation.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; official Caltech-IPAC GitHub repository describes Montage and links the official Montage homepage.
tags_sources: source_facts.description mentions FITS image mosaics; official repository README adds astronomy, reprojection, background matching, visualization, and IPAC context.
